source: MINNA NO NIHONGO I, 2nd Edition (Romanized Version) — UP Cebu Vocabulary Translation Guide

words.english: Is it? / Am I? / Are you?
I am pleased to meet you
No, I am not a student

sentences.english: Mr. Santos is not a student.
Is Mr. Miller an office worker?
Mr. Santos is also an office worker.

sentences.romaji: Anata wa Maiku Mira-san desu ka.
Iie, watashi wa gakusei ja arimasen.
sentences.english: No, I am not a student.
Is Mr. Wang a bank employee?

sentences.romaji: Iie, Wan-san wa ginkōin ja arimasen.
sentences.english: No, Mr. Wang is not a bank employee.

sentences.romaji: Ano kata wa donata desu ka.
Watto-san desu. Sakura-daigaku no sensei desu.
sentences.english: That is Mr. Watt. He is a professor at Sakura University.
Is Mr. Gupta an office worker?
Yes, he is an office worker.
Is Ms. Karina also an office worker?
No, Ms. Karina is a student.

sentences.romaji: Ano hito wa Kimura-san desu ka.
Watashi wa IMC no shain desu.
sentences.english: I am an employee of IMC.
Please treat me kindly. / Pleased to meet you.

sentences.romaji: Sore wa watashi no kasa desu.
Kono hon wa watashi no desu.
Kore wa "9" desu ka, "7" desu ka.

sentences.english: That over there is a dictionary.
He is in the conference room.

sentences.romaji: Sore wa doko no kutsu desu ka.
Kono tokei wa ikura desu ka.

sentences.english: I wake up at 6 o'clock every morning.

sentences.romaji: Nyūyōku wa ima nan-ji desu ka.
sentences.english: What time is it now in New York?
What day is your day off?

sentences.romaji: Appuru-ginkō wa nan-ji kara nan-ji made desu ka.
sentences.english: What time is Apple Bank open from and until?
What time do you go to bed every night?
I go to bed at 11 o'clock.

sentences.romaji: Mainichi nan-ji kara nan-ji made benkyō-shimasu ka.
sentences.english: What time do you study every day?
I study from 9 in the morning to 3 in the afternoon.

sentences.romaji: Sumimasen, "Asuka" no denwa-bangō wa nan-ban desu ka.
sentences.english: Excuse me, what is the phone number for "Asuka"?

sentences.romaji: Sumimasen. Sochira wa nan-ji made desu ka.
sentences.english: Excuse me. Until what time are you open?

sentences.romaji: Tōkyō wa ima nan-ji desu ka.
sentences.english: What time is it now in Tokyo?

sentences.romaji: Watashi wa takushii de uchi e kaerimasu.
sentences.english: I am returning home by taxi.
Where did you go on Sunday?

sentences.romaji: Nan de Tōkyō e ikimasu ka.
sentences.english: How are you going to Tokyo?

sentences.romaji: Dare to Tōkyō e ikimasu ka.
sentences.english: Who are you going to Tokyo with?
I am going with Mr. Yamada.
What time did you wake up this morning?

sentences.romaji: Sorekara tomodachi to eiga o mimashita.
sentences.english: After that, I watched a movie with a friend.

sentences.romaji: Doko de sono kaban o kaimashita ka.
sentences.english: Where did you buy that bag?

sentences.romaji: Watashi wa eki de shinbun o kaimasu.
sentences.english: I buy newspapers at the station.
What do you eat every morning?
What did you eat this morning?
What did you do on Saturday?
Would you like to play tennis tomorrow?

sentences.romaji: Uchi de shukudai o shimasu. Sorekara CD o kikimasu.
sentences.english: I'll do my homework at home. After that, I'll listen to a CD.

sentences.romaji: Watashi wa kazoku to Nihon e kimashita.
sentences.english: I came to Japan with my family.

sentences.romaji: Issho ni Kōbe e ikimasen ka.
sentences.english: Would you like to go to Kobe together?

sentences.romaji: Ii desu ne. Doko e ikimasu ka?
sentences.english: That sounds great. Where are you going?
Let's meet at Osaka Station at 10 o'clock.
Ms. Mira wakes up every morning at 7 o'clock.

sentences.romaji: Asagohan wa itsumo pan to kōhii desu.
sentences.english: Breakfast is always bread and coffee.

words.english: Did (used in verbs for past tense)
Do not watch or do not see

sentences.romaji: Terebi de Nihon-go o benkyō-shimashita ka.
sentences.english: Did you study Japanese with the television?
No, I studied with the radio.

sentences.romaji: Nihon-go de repōto o kakimasu ka.
sentences.english: Will you write the report in Japanese?
No, I will write it in English.

sentences.romaji: "Goodbye" wa Nihon-go de nan desu ka.
Dare ni nengajō o kakimasu ka.
sentences.english: To whom will you write the New Year's card?

sentences.romaji: Mō shinkansen no kippu o kaimashita ka.
sentences.english: Have you already bought the Shinkansen ticket?
No, not yet. I'll eat it soon.

sentences.romaji: Okāsan no tanjōbi ni nani o agemashita ka.
sentences.english: What did you give your mother for her birthday?

sentences.romaji: Kyonen no Kurisumasu ni nani o moraimashita ka.
sentences.english: What did you receive last Christmas?
I received a tie and a book.

sentences.romaji: Doko de Nihon-go o naraimashita ka.
Itsu sensei ni repōto o okurimasu ka.
sentences.english: When will you send the report to the teacher?

sentences.romaji: Dare ni kono CD o karimashita ka.
sentences.english: Who did you borrow this CD from?
I borrowed it from a friend.

sentences.romaji: Watashi wa pasokon de eiga o mimasu.
sentences.english: I watch movies on the computer.

sentences.romaji: Watashi wa Kimura-san ni hana o agemasu.
Watashi wa Karina-san ni chokorēto o moraimashita.
Kōhii, mō ippai ikaga desu ka.
sentences.english: Would you like another cup of coffee?

sentences.romaji: A, mō 6-ji desu ne. Sorosoro shitsurei-shimasu.
sentences.english: Ah, it's already 6 o'clock. I should get going.
Thank you very much for today.
Not at all. Please come again.

sentences.romaji: Nara wa donna machi desu ka.
sentences.english: What kind of town is Nara?

sentences.romaji: Daigaku no ryō wa benri desu.
Nihon no kamera wa takai desu ka.
Ano resutoran wa shizuka desu ka.
Kaisha no shokudō wa yasui desu ka.
Sono pasokon wa ii desu ka.
Sono techō wa benri desu ka.
Nihon no chikatetsu wa dō desu ka.
Nihon no kuruma wa dō desu ka.
Kaisha no ryō wa atarashii desu.
Nihon no tabemono wa oishii desu.
Nihon no seikatsu wa isogashii desu.

sentences.english: Tokyo Station is a big station.
Kobe Hospital is a famous hospital.

sentences.romaji: Suisu wa kirei na kuni desu.
Tanjōbi ni suteki na purezento o moraimashita.
sentences.english: I received a wonderful present for my birthday.

sentences.romaji: Sumimasen. Sono kaban o misete kudasai.
sentences.english: Excuse me. Please show me that bag.
I went to Kinkakuji last week.

sentences.romaji: Sakura-daigaku wa ōkii daigaku dewa arimasen ga, ii daigaku desu.
sentences.english: Sakura University is not a big university, but it's a good one.

sentences.romaji: Shokudō wa 12-ji kara 1-ji made totemo nigiyaka desu.
sentences.english: The cafeteria is very lively from 12 to 1.
